sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated 'Abdullah bin 'Amr (RA): A woman said, "O Allah's Messenger, this son of mine: my womb was a receptacle for him, my breasts were a source of suckling for him, and my lap was a place for him to curl up in, yet his father has divorced me and wants to take him away from me." Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) replied to her, "You have more right to him as long as you do not remarry."

.
iwh_en:
Abdullah bin 'Amr (RA) (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a woman said, "O Allah's Messenger ﷺ, this son of mine: my womb was a receptacle for him, my breasts were a source of suckling for him, and my lap was a place for him to curl up in, yet his father has divorced me and wants to take him away from me." Allah's Messenger ﷺ replied to her, "You have more right to him as long as you do not remarry."

.
iwh_id:
Abdullah bin 'Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa seorang perempuan bersabda, "O Rasulullah ﷺ, this putra mine: my womb was a receptacle for him, my breasts were a source of suckling for him, and my lap was a place for him to curl up in, yet ayahnya has divorced me dan wants to mengambil him away from me." Rasulullah ﷺ menjawab to her, "You have more kanan to him as panjang as you jangan remarry."

.

ar:
وَعَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ‏- رضى الله عنه ‏- أَنَّ اِمْرَأَةً قَالَتْ: { يَا رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ! إِنَّ زَوْجِي يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَذْهَبَ بِابْنِي, وَقَدْ نَفَعَنِي, وَسَقَانِي مِنْ بِئْرِ أَبِي عِنَبَةَ  1‏ فَجَاءَ زَوْجُهَا, فَقَالَ اَلنَّبِيُّ ‏- صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏-
"يَا غُلَامُ! هَذَا أَبُوكَ وَهَذِهِ  2‏ أُمُّكَ, فَخُذْ بِيَدِ أَيُّهُمَا شِئْتَ" فَأَخَذَ بِيَدِ أُمِّهِ, فَانْطَلَقَتْ بِهِ.‏ }  رَوَاهُ أَحْمَدُ, وَالْأَرْبَعَةُ, وَصَحَّحَهُ اَلتِّرْمِذِيُّ  3‏‏1 ‏- تحرف في "أ" إلى "عتبة".‏‏2 ‏- تحرف في "أ" إلى: "وهذا".‏‏3 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه أحمد (246)‏، وأبو داود (2277)‏، والنسائي (685 ‏- 186)‏، والترمذي (1357)‏، وابن ماجه (2351)‏.‏ ولفظ الترمذي: أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم خير غلاما بين أبيه وأمه.‏ ولفظ ابن ماجه وأحمد، مثله، وزادا: "يا غلام هذا أبوك، وهذه أمك" وزاد أحمد: "اختر".‏ وقال الترمذي: "حديث حسن صحيح".‏ وفي الحديث قصة عند أبي داود: قال أبو ميمونة: بينما أنا جالس مع أبي هريرة جاءته امرأة فارسية معها ابن لها، فادعياه، وقد طلقها زوجها، فقالت: يا أبا هريرة! ورطنت له بالفارسية، زوجي يريد أن يذهب بابني، فقال أبو هريرة: استهما عليه، ورطن لها بذلك، فجاء زوجها، فقال: من يحاقني في ولدي؟ فقال أبو هريرة: اللهم إني لا أقول هذا إلا أني سمعت امرأة جاءت إلى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم وأنا قاعد عنده فقالت: يا رسول الله… الحديث.‏ وفيه من قوله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "استهما عليه".‏ قبل: تخيير الغلام.‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated Abu Hurairah (RA): A woman said, "O Allah's Messenger, my husband wants to take away my son, while he has benefited me and provided me with drinking water from the well of Abu 'Inabah." Then her husband came and the Prophet (ﷺ) said: "Young man, this is your father and this is your mother, so take whoever of them you wish by the hand." He took his mother's hand and she went off with him.

.
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (RA) (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a woman said, "O Allah's Messenger ﷺ, my husband wants to take away my son, while he has benefited me and provided me with drinking water from the well of Abu 'Inabah." Then her husband came and the Prophet ﷺ said: "Young man, this is your father and this is your mother, so take whoever of them you wish by the hand." He took his mother's hand and she went off with him.

.
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (RA) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa seorang perempuan berkata, "O Rasulullah ﷺ, my husband wants to mengambil away my son, while he has benefited me dan provided me with drinking water from the well of Abu 'Inabah." Kemudian suaminya came and Nabi ﷺ berkata: "Young man, this is your father dan this is your mother, jadi mengambil siapa pun yang of them you wish by the hand." He mengambil ibunya's hand dan ia went off bersamanya.

.

ar:
وَعَنْ رَافِعِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ; { أَنَّهُ أَسْلَمَ, وَأَبَتِ اِمْرَأَتُهُ أَنْ تُسْلِمَ.‏ فَأَقْعَدَ اَلنَّبِيَّ ‏- صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏-اَلْأُمَّ نَاحِيَةً, وَالْأَبَ نَاحِيَةً, وَأَقْعَدَ اَلصَّبِيَّ بَيْنَهُمَا.‏ فَمَالَ إِلَى أُمِّهِ, فَقَالَ: 
"اَللَّهُمَّ اِهْدِهِ".‏ فَمَالَ إِلَى أَبِيهِ, فَأَخَذَهُ.‏ }  أَخْرَجَهُ أَبُو دَاوُدَ, وَالنَّسَائِيُّ, وَصححه الْحَاكِمُ  1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه أبو داود (2244)‏، والنسائي (685)‏، والحاكم (206 ‏- 213)‏.‏ وقال الحاكم: "حديث صحيح الإسناد ولم يخرجاه".‏

matn_ar_clean:
, والأب ناحية, وأقعد الصبي بينهما. فمال إلى أمه, فقال: 
"اللهم اهده". فمال إلى أبيه, فأخذه. } أخرجه أبو داود, والنسائي, وصححه الحاكم 1 .1 - صحيح. رواه أبو داود (2244)، والنسائي (685)، والحاكم (206 - 213). وقال الحاكم: "حديث صحيح الإسناد ولم يخرجاه".
sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated Rafi' bin Sinan (RA): He accepted Islam but his wife refused to accept it. The Prophet (ﷺ) then made the mother sit down to a side and the father to another side and made the son sit down between them. He (the son) then inclined to his mother, so the Prophet (ﷺ) then said. "O Allah, give him guidance." Then he inclined to his father and he took him.

.
iwh_en:
Rafi' bin Sinan (RA) (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that he accepted Islam but his wife refused to accept it. the Prophet ﷺ then made the mother sit down to a side and the father to another side and made the son sit down between them. He (the son) then inclined to his mother, so the Prophet ﷺ then said. "O Allah, give him guidance." Then he inclined to his father and he took him.

.
iwh_id:
Rafi' bin Sinan (RA) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa he accepted Islam namun istrinya refused to accept it. Nabi ﷺ kemudian membuat the mother duduk down to a side dan the father to another side dan membuat the son duduk down antara them. He (the son) kemudian inclined to ibunya, jadi Nabi ﷺ kemudian berkata. "Ya Allah, memberikan him guidance." Kemudian he inclined to ayahnya dan ia mengambil him.

.

ar: وَعَنْ اَلْبَرَاءِ بْنِ عَازِبِ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا; { أَنَّ اَلنَّبِيَّ ‏- صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏-قَضَى فِي اِبْنَةِ حَمْزَةَ لِخَالَتِهَا, وَقَالَ: اَلْخَالَةُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلْأُمِّ.‏ }  أَخْرَجَهُ اَلْبُخَارِيُّ  1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ وهو قطعة من حديث رواه البخاري (2699)‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: وعن البراء بن عازب رضي الله عنهما; { أن النبي ‏- صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏-قضى في ابنة حمزة لخالتها, وقال: الخالة بمنزلة الأم.‏ }  أخرجه البخاري  1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ وهو قطعة من حديث رواه البخاري (2699)‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated al-Bara bin 'Azib (RA): The Prophet (ﷺ) gave a ruling regarding Hamza's daughter in favor of her maternal aunt, saying, "The maternal aunt is in the position of the mother."

.
iwh_en:
al-Bara bin 'Azib (RA) (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ gave a ruling regarding Hamza's daughter in favor of her maternal aunt, saying, "The maternal aunt is in the position of the mother."

.
iwh_id:
al-Bara bin 'Azib (RA) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberikan a ruling tentang Hamza's daughter in favor of her bibi dari pihak ibu, saying, "The bibi dari pihak ibu is in the position of the mother."

.

ar: وَأَخْرَجَهُ أَحْمَدُ: مِنْ حَدِيثِ عَلَيٍّ فَقَالَ: { وَالْجَارِيَةُ عِنْدَ خَالَتِهَا, فَإِنَّ اَلْخَالَةَ وَالِدَةٌ }   1‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه أحمد (770)‏.‏
ar_clean: وَأَخْرَجَهُ أَحْمَدُ: مِنْ حَدِيثِ عَلَيٍّ فَقَالَ: { وَالْجَارِيَةُ عِنْدَ خَالَتِهَا, فَإِنَّ اَلْخَالَةَ وَالِدَةٌ } 11 - صحيح. رواه أحمد (770).
matn_ar: وَأَخْرَجَهُ أَحْمَدُ: مِنْ حَدِيثِ عَلَيٍّ فَقَالَ: { وَالْجَارِيَةُ عِنْدَ خَالَتِهَا, فَإِنَّ اَلْخَالَةَ وَالِدَةٌ }   1‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه أحمد (770)‏.‏
matn_ar_clean: وأخرجه أحمد: من حديث علي فقال: { والجارية عند خالتها, فإن الخالة والدة }   1‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه أحمد (770)‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Ahmad reported it from the Hadith of 'Ali (RA), he said, "The little girl must be with her maternal aunt for the maternal aunt is (the same as) a mother."
iwh_en: Ahmad reported it from the Hadith of 'Ali (RA), he said, "The little girl must be with her maternal aunt for the maternal aunt is (the same as) a mother."
iwh_id: Ahmad meriwayatkan it from the Hadith of 'Ali (RA), he berkata, "The little girl must be with her bibi dari pihak ibu for the bibi dari pihak ibu is (the same as) a mother."

ar: وَعَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ‏- رضى الله عنه ‏- قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ ‏- صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏-{ إِذَا أَتَى أَحَدَكُمْ خَادِمُهُ بِطَعَامِهِ, فَإِنْ لَمْ يُجْلِسْهُ مَعَهُ, فَلْيُنَاوِلْهُ لُقْمَةً أَوْ لُقْمَتَيْنِ }  مُتَّفَقٌ عَلَيْهِ, وَاللَّفْظُ لِلْبُخَارِيِّ  1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه البخاري (5460)‏، ومسلم (1663)‏، ولمسلم: (أكلة أو أكلتين)‏ وهي أيضا للبخاري، وفسرها أحد رواة مسلم بـ: "لقمة أو لقمتين".‏ وزاد البخاري: "فإنه ولي حره وعلاجه" ولمسلم: "حره ودخانه".‏

sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated Abu Hurairah (RA): Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) said: "When one's servant serves him with his food, if he does not make him sit down with him (and eat) he should give him one or two morsels (of it)."

.
iwh_en:
Abu Hurairah (RA) (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ said: "When one's servant serves him with his food, if he does not make him sit down with him (and eat) he should give him one or two morsels (of it)."

.
iwh_id:
Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "When one's servant serves him with his food, if he does not membuat him duduk down with him (and eat) he should memberikan him one or two morsels (of it)."

.

ar: وَعَنْ اِبْنِ عُمَرَ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا; عَنْ اَلنَّبِيِّ ‏- صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏-قَالَ: { عُذِّبَتْ اِمْرَأَةٌ فِي هِرَّةٍ سَجَنَتْهَا حَتَّى مَاتَتْ, فَدَخَلْتِ اَلنَّارَ فِيهَا, لَا هِيَ أَطْعَمَتْهَا وَسَقَتْهَا إِذْ هِيَ حَبَسَتْهَا, وَلَا هِيَ تَرَكَتْهَا, تَأْكُلُ مِنْ خَشَاشِ اَلْأَرْضِ }  مُتَّفَقٌ عَلَيْهِ  1‏ .‏‏1 ‏- صحيح.‏ رواه البخاري (3482)‏، ومسلم (2242)‏.‏

matn_ar_clean: بستها, ولا هي تركتها, تأكل من خشاش الأرض } متفق عليه 1 .1 - صحيح. رواه البخاري (3482)، ومسلم (2242).
sunnah_ref_en:
Narrated Ibn 'Umar (RA): The Prophet (ﷺ) said: "A woman was punished on account of a cat which she held captive till it died. Hence, she entered the Hell-Fire due to (her mistreatment of) the cat. She did not feed it or give it water while she held it captive, nor did she let it out so that it may eat the things that creep on the earth."

.
iwh_en:
Ibn 'Umar (RA) (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said: "A woman was punished on account of a cat which she held captive till it died. Hence, she entered the Hell-Fire due to (her mistreatment of) the cat. She did not feed it or give it water while she held it captive, nor did she let it out so that it may eat the things that creep on the earth."

.
iwh_id:
Ibn 'Umar (RA) (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melaporkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata: "A woman was punished on account of a cat which she held captive till it died. Hence, she entered the Neraka-Fire due to (her mistreatment of) the cat. She tidak feed it or memberikan it water while she held it captive, dan tidak did she let it out sehingga it may eat the hal-hal that creep on the earth."

.
